lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Not much really... I run a local shop which earns me a few trading sticks, but that's about it. I keep myself to myself really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are trading sticks?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: They're the local currency Bwana, it's used in Tai Bwo Wannai, there's usually some odd jobs that need doing around the village which you could do to earn some trading sticks.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Or, if you have something which the local villagers might like, you could sell it to me and I'll pay you for it in trading sticks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of things do the local villagers like?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Gnome cocktails! It's amazing but we all just love them! Luckily I've managed to get stocks of the gnome made cocktails and I supply those to my favourite customers. However, many of the customers really like the cocktails

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: made by the adventurers passing through this way. If you ever happen to have any, bring them my way! I'll give you a good deal on it that's for sure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did the villagers ever get to try any gnome cocktails?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: I think it was that gnome pilot who crashed his glider, perhaps he had a little mini-bar on board? Come to think about it, you'd expect the little guy to get his stuff together and move on out of here wouldn't you? He

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: must love the jungle to have stayed here so long!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You run a shop?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Yes, it's the Tai Bwo cooperative... catchy name huh! We sell a few local village trinkets and tools. Also, there are a few items that we're actually looking to stock for the locals' sake.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: If you happen across any of them please bring them to me, I'll pay a good price for them. I'm sure you'll find the prices very reasonable.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I take a look at what you have to sell?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Sure you can...which shop would you like to see? The Cooperative or Drinks store?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: None thanks...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you only take one sort of Gnome cocktail?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: It's funny that actually. I've managed to get a good deal with the pilot of that gnome glider. He can supply me directly now. However, it's really interesting that the local villagers really like the gnome cocktails made by the

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: adventurers passing through this way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why, what's the difference?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: I think it may just be that they're made fresher, or there is a slight twist in the flavour of the drink, you know, a little more of this, a little less of that, it all adds up and makes for an interesting tipple!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to ask another question.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Sure, what do you want to ask?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything interesting to do around here?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Sorry Bwana, I'm already busy, why not go and talk to Murcaily! He's around the village somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been doing some work around the village.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Yeah, you've been doing a lot of good work around here. Let me give you something for your time and effort.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Wrong answer!

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Sounds right!

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Hey there. If you can solve a question for me then you can move on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the question?

lines.speaker: Gabooty
lines.text: Here, I wrote it down for you.
